BitmapArtist - Class in javashooter.rendering
 
BitmapArtist(GameObject, BufferedImage, double) - Constructor for class javashooter.rendering.BitmapArtist
 
BitmapObject - Class in javashooter.gameobjects
Convenience Class subclassing GameObject, pre-creationg a subclass of Artist that draws a bitmap animation described by the Animation class.
BitmapObject(String, Playground, double, double, double, double, double, String) - Constructor for class javashooter.gameobjects.BitmapObject
Constructor.
BlinkArtist - Class in javashooter.rendering
 
BlinkArtist(GameObject, double, double, Color) - Constructor for class javashooter.rendering.BlinkArtist
 
broadcast(String) - Method in class javashooter.playground.Playground
Sends a broadcast message to all registered objects, not immediately but in next timestep to avoid inconsistencies.
